prompts.name: Anime Realism
prompts.text: Render the image with anime-inspired beauty combined with realistic lighting, believable materials, and clean polished detail.

prompts.name: Soft Anime
prompts.text: Render the image with soft anime styling, gentle gradients, smooth shading, and expressive facial clarity.

prompts.name: Cinematic Realism
prompts.text: Render the image with cinematic realism, natural depth, controlled contrast, and polished visual storytelling.

prompts.name: Painterly
prompts.text: Render the image with painterly softness, visible artistic texture, elegant color blending, and refined illustration quality.

prompts.name: Editorial Render
prompts.text: Render the image with premium editorial polish, refined styling, crisp details, and confident visual presentation.

prompts.name: Clean Digital
prompts.text: Render the image with clean digital finish, sharp lines, clear details, and controlled color.

prompts.name: Filmic
prompts.text: Render the image with filmic contrast, subtle grain, natural highlight rolloff, and cohesive color mood.

prompts.name: High Detail
prompts.text: Render with high detail across the subject, clothing, materials, and environment while keeping the composition readable.

prompts.name: Soft Light Render
prompts.text: Render with gentle soft lighting, reduced harshness, smooth transitions, and attractive subject clarity.

prompts.name: Luxury Polish
prompts.text: Render with a luxurious polished finish, premium surfaces, elegant color, and refined detail.

prompts.name: Natural Render
prompts.text: Render with natural colors, believable skin tones, realistic lighting, and restrained post-processing.

prompts.name: Dreamy Render
prompts.text: Render with dreamy softness, delicate glow, gentle atmosphere, and slightly romantic visual flow.

prompts.name: Sharp Focus
prompts.text: Render with crisp subject focus, defined facial features, clear clothing detail, and controlled background softness.

prompts.name: Atmospheric Render
prompts.text: Render with strong atmospheric depth, light diffusion, subtle particles, and layered space.

prompts.name: Final Polish
prompts.text: Apply final polish with balanced exposure, clean detail, consistent style, and strong overall image quality.
